name: Lost Relics of the Knights Templar
original_name: Lost Relics of the Knights Templar
overview: Lost Relics of the Knights Templar follows one of the world’s most prolific yet unknown treasure hunters, Hamilton White, and his long-time friend, Carl Cookson, as they trace the origin of an amazing hoard of relics – believed to have belonged to the legendary Knights Templar.

trailers.title: Lost Relics Of The Knights Templar | Trailer | HISTORY® Channel
